layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 internal padding for bounded containers.
layout.card_style: Flat background, 1px solid black border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-lg) with border darkening.

components.navigation: Sticky left-sidebar or top navigation. Solid white background with 1px right/bottom border. No transparent headers.
components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none), solid primary background for main CTAs. High contrast hover states (e.g. hover:bg-[#111111] hover:text-white).
components.inputs: Shadcn Form and Input elements. Sharp edges (rounded-none), 1px solid border. Focus states must have high contrast rings.
components.charts: Shadcn charts / Recharts. Use sharp linear lines (type='linear'), not smooth curves, to match the technical aesthetic.

specific_features_guidance.add_topics: Use Shadcn Dialog/Sheet for adding new problems/topics. Ensure input fields have clear, heavy labels.
specific_features_guidance.progress_tracking: Use Shadcn Select or Toggle Group. Color-code tags: Easy (Green), Medium (Yellow), Hard (Red).
specific_features_guidance.revision_reminders: Dedicated 'Alert' style widget on the dashboard. Use Warning Yellow or Signal Red accents to indicate overdue spaced repetition tasks.
specific_features_guidance.notes_links: Use clean, monospaced text areas for notes to enforce the developer tool aesthetic. Use an icon alongside external links.

motion.hover: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-black hover:text-white
motion.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease

image_urls.description: Minimalist white architecture, used as an abstract visual for the developer tool's authentication screen.
Abstract white architectural clock visual, used for the spaced repetition/revision reminders empty state.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-topic-button', data-testid='mark-progress-select').

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the specified colors and typography (Cabinet Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Mono for body).
Use Shadcn UI for all complex components (Select, Dialog, Tabs, Charts) but override border-radius to rounded-none to match the Swiss Brutalist archetype.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every interactive element.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn Dropdown/Select and Calendar.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard: dense, data-heavy, maximizing vertical space.
